category_sources: Official docs state GBOX provides Mobile, Browser, Desktop, and Sandbox environments for AI agents.
source_facts.description says GBOX provides environments for AI Agents to operate computer and mobile devices.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is gbox; official site and documentation brand the project as GBOX.
docs_sources: Official dedicated documentation domain docs.gbox.ai is linked from the official project site.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/babelcloud/gbox, so repo was not re-determined per instruction.
tags_sources: Official docs describe mobile, browser, desktop, and sandbox environments plus SDK/API usage.
source_facts.description identifies AI agent device environments.
